children.text: an amount not exceeding four percent of such amount to defray the expenses of administering the provisions of this chapter during such fiscal year; and

children.label: A
children.text: for meetings, including meetings of an association recognized under section 4954(f), to discuss best practices for the improvement of the operations of procurement technical assistance centers; and1See References in Text note below.1

children.label: B
children.text: for membership dues for any association of such centers created by eligible entities, training fees and associated travel for training to carry out the purposes of this chapter, and voluntary participation on any committees or board of such an association.
